description: The accounting department needs a single flat table containing all invoice line item details for their legacy reporting tool. Create a new table named "InvoiceReport" in the Chinook music store database. The table must include these 14 columns: "InvoiceLineId" (INTEGER), "InvoiceId" (INTEGER), "InvoiceDate" (TIMESTAMP), "CustomerName" (VARCHAR(80), Customer.FirstName || ' ' || Customer.LastName), "CustomerCountry" (VARCHAR(40)), "SupportRepName" (VARCHAR(80), Employee.FirstName || ' ' || Employee.LastName), "TrackName" (VARCHAR(200)), "AlbumTitle" (VARCHAR(160)), "ArtistName" (VARCHAR(120)), "GenreName" (VARCHAR(120)), "MediaTypeName" (VARCHAR(120)), "UnitPrice" (NUMERIC(10,2)), "Quantity" (INTEGER), and "LineTotal" (NUMERIC(10,2), UnitPrice * Quantity). Populate the table by joining the InvoiceLine, Invoice, Customer, Employee, Track, Album, Artist, Genre, and MediaType tables using their standard relationships. Save the database to persist the changes.
